title: Polish Pinake TreeView hierarchy and empty states
description:
Improve the visual design and usability of the Pinake Project Documentation TreeView while staying inside native VS Code UI patterns.

Focus on hierarchy, labels, descriptions, tooltips, ThemeIcons, Favorites, generated/internal files, and an onboarding empty state using VS Code contributions such as viewsWelcome where appropriate.

checklist.text: Review current TreeView labels, descriptions, tooltip content, and icon choices.
Add or refine a clear empty/onboarding state for workspaces without Pinake documentation.
Ensure Favorites, folders, Markdown documents, manifests, and internal/generated files are visually distinct.
Keep the interface minimalist by using native TreeView affordances instead of extra custom chrome.
Add or update tests for any changed TreeItem metadata or view contributions.
